gist.headline: A ghost in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Someone built a game called 'The room' and added it to the community showcase. It features a ghost jumpscare, so consider yourself warned. We love it.
gist.summary: Added the community-created game 'The room' to the pollinations.ai app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play 'The room' from the community games list.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee encountering a cute pixel ghost in a cozy, slightly spooky room. Represents the new 'The room' game and its ghost jumpscare.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, looking surprised as a friendly, translucent pixel ghost pops out of a retro computer monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and dark purple (#110518) gradient background with warm, cozy lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
